title: Bytes, Encodings, and Cryptographic Primitive Selection · Language Lens: Crypto Go Primitive Composition
summary: An API team base64-encodes tokens, labels the result encrypted, hashes secrets for transport, and compares text representations without defining canonical bytes. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the primitive composition increment in byte representation and primitive decision table. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Choose a vetted high-level construction that supplies the required combined properties instead of composing low-level primitives casually.
Distinguish encoding, checksums, hashing, MACs, signatures, encryption, key agreement, KEMs, and password hashing by purpose and reversibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Primitive Composition · Theory Crypto Go Primitive Composition
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 1757 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate encoding, hashing, authentication, confidentiality, reversibility, and canonical domain-bound bytes; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose a vetted high-level construction that supplies the required combined properties instead of composing low-level primitives casually.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Primitive Composition contract for the supplied data.
